prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类/理科最低位次约44100→56213→59507→49302→51936，整体波动较大，2022–2023年位次明显后移（数字增大），2024年有所回升，2025年再次小幅后移至约51936名；近5年位次均值约52212名，2025年基准约51936名；该校在陕西省物理类招生计划2021年89人、2022年93人、2023年91人、2024年95人、2025年132人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计划144人，较2025年再扩招约9.1%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 石河子大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第135名，近年排名持续上升（2021年165→2022年157→2023年138→2024年136→2025年140→2026年135），学校综合实力稳步提升；2022年声誉评价偏负面（宿舍改造问题），近年无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第58位，评价为较热，综合热度约55万，在211高校中处于中等偏上水平，反映一定报考关注度；未见明显投档断档记录；石河子大学在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科主要集中在农业、医学、师范等领域，学科评估等级以B类为主，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年陕西省物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34032人（+19.7%），考生规模大幅增长，竞争压力显著上升；石河子大学位于新疆，距陕西较远，地域偏好对陕西考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年物理类考生大幅增加（+19.7%）、招生计划扩招（+9.1%）部分抵消竞争压力、软科排名持续上升、抖音热度较热等因素，考虑考生规模增长带来的竞争加剧效应，预测2026年最低位次约55269名，区间54769–55769名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics/Science was approximately 44100 → 56213 → 59507 → 49302 → 51936, showing significant fluctuations. Rankings notably shifted backward (increased numbers) in 2022–2023, rebounded in 2024, and slightly moved back again to about 51936 in 2025. The 5-year average ranking is about 52212, with a 2025 baseline of about 51936. Enrollment plans in Shaanxi for Physics were 89 in 2021, 93 in 2022, 91 in 2023, 95 in 2024, and 132 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 144, an increase of about 9.1% from 2025, a relatively large expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is about 135th in 2026, with a steady upward trend in recent years (165 in 2021 → 157 in 2022 → 138 in 2023 → 136 in 2024 → 140 in 2025 → 135 in 2026), indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength. In 2022, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (dormitory renovation issue), but no major negative public opinion in recent years. Douyin popularity ranks 58th, rated as relatively hot, with comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, reflecting a certain level of application attention. No significant enrollment gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shihezi University has no disciplines rated A- or above; its advantageous disciplines are mainly in agriculture, medicine, and education, with discipline evaluation grades mainly at B level, limiting appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of Physics candidates in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) from 172,468 in 2025, representing a significant growth in candidate numbers and a notable increase in competition pressure. Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Shaanxi, and regional preferences somewhat inhibit the willingness of Shaanxi candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, the significant increase in Physics candidates in 2026 (+19.7%), the enrollment plan expansion (+9.1%) partially offsetting competitive pressure, the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity, along with the intensified competition due to candidate growth, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 55269, with a range of 54769–55769.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 55269, with a range of 54769–55769. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (54769) are advised to focus on Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science. Candidates in the middle of the range should prioritize Tier 2 majors while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates near the upper limit (55769) should use Tier 3 majors as safety options, mainly choose Tier 2 majors, and cautiously select Tier 1 majors. Shihezi University is a 211 university with high cost-effectiveness, suitable for candidates with moderate scores who wish to obtain a 211 platform.

学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university.
